title: centaurea montana var. lingulata
intro: Centaurea montana var. lingulata, also known as Mountain Cornflower or Cornflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurea montana var. lingulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
